attractions.name: Eiffel Tower
attractions.description_short: The iconic iron tower in Paris built for the 1889 Exposition.

attractions.name: Louvre Museum
attractions.description_short: The Louvre is the world's largest art museum located in Paris.

attractions.name: Notre-Dame de Paris
attractions.description_short: A 12th-century Gothic cathedral famous for its architecture and history.

attractions.name: Notre-Dame de la Garde
attractions.description_short: A 19th-century basilica overlooking Marseille from atop a hill.

attractions.name: Old Port of Marseille
attractions.description_short: The historic harbor of Marseille, active since antiquity.

attractions.name: Basilica of Notre-Dame de Fourvière
attractions.description_short: A late-19th century basilica perched on Fourvière hill in Lyon.

attractions.name: Saint-Sernin Basilica
attractions.description_short: A massive Romanesque pilgrimage church in Toulouse.

attractions.name: Promenade des Anglais
attractions.description_short: The famous seaside boulevard in Nice, France.

attractions.name: Castle of the Dukes of Brittany
attractions.description_short: A medieval castle and museum in Nantes.

attractions.name: Place de la Comédie
attractions.description_short: The central pedestrian square of Montpellier.

attractions.name: Place de la Bourse
attractions.description_short: Historic riverside square in Bordeaux with the famous Water Mirror.

attractions.name: Grand Place, Lille
match_names: Grand Place (Place du Général de Gaulle)
attractions.description_short: The central historic square of Lille lined with cafes and the old stock exchange.

adventure_locations.name: Mont-Saint-Michel
adventure_locations.description_short: A medieval abbey on a tidal island in Normandy.

adventure_locations.name: Gorges du Verdon
adventure_locations.description_short: A deep river canyon in Provence, known as Europe's 'Grand Canyon'.

adventure_locations.name: Camargue Regional Natural Park
adventure_locations.description_short: A unique wetland region known for its wildlife and marshes.

adventure_locations.name: Mont Blanc
adventure_locations.description_short: The tallest mountain in the Alps and Western Europe.

adventure_locations.name: Dune du Pilat
adventure_locations.description_short: Europe's tallest sand dune on the Atlantic coast.
